title: Capitol Hill
summary: The True Sons strongpoint where President Ellis and the encryption key needed to reach the broad-spectrum antiviral are held.

claims.text: The True Sons hold President Ellis and his encryption key at Capitol Hill.
Division Agents rescue Ellis and retake Capitol Hill from the True Sons before Black Tusk enters Washington.

paragraphs.text: Retaking Capitol Hill appears to complete the struggle against the True Sons and unlock the route to the antiviral, but it immediately precedes the Black Tusk siege.

verification.notes: This page records the narrative location; an objective-level Capitol Building mission record remains pending direct capture.
